sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62948" key="lhci/fwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληξῐ´-φωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">waning</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.34</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληξῐ-φωτέω</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wane</tr_>, Anubion ap.eund. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
